Modular by Design

Start with what matters to you. Add the rest later.

Chronicle Health is four powerful tools in one app. Enable only what you need from the very first day — and toggle the rest on whenever you’re ready. No clutter. No overwhelm. Just the features you actually use.

❤️  Health Tab

Chronicle AI organises your entire medical life.

This isn't a notes app. Chronicle AI structures your visits, labs, vitals, and medications automatically — so everything is searchable, shareable, and explained in language you actually understand.

🌞
For women — Luteal Phase Tracking is unlocked automatically When Chronicle detects a female profile, the app unlocks a dedicated Luteal page where you can track your menstrual cycle, symptom patterns across phases, and hormonal fluctuations like PCOS — all in one place.
🏥 Doctor Visits — AI-Explained Summaries›
Record by voice or upload documents. Chronicle AI breaks every visit into three clear sections: Reason for Visit, What the Doctor Found, and What This Means For Me — in plain English. Ask follow-up questions any time.
💓 Vitals — Synced from Apple Watch›
Heart rate, resting HR, blood pressure, blood oxygen, steps, activity, and temperature — pulled automatically from Apple Health. Trend charts show how you're tracking over time against reference ranges.
🧪 Lab Results — Flagged & Explained›
Upload lab PDFs or photos. Chronicle organises CBC, Metabolic, Thyroid, and other panels — flags out-of-range values and explains what each result means for your health in everyday language.
📋 Generate Doctor Report›
Export a structured PDF of your health history with one tap — visits, labs, vitals, and medications — so every appointment is backed by real data, not just your memory.
🧠  Mind Tab

Your second brain — for everything that lives in your head.

The Health tab is where Chronicle AI organises your medical data. The Mind tab is where you think, reflect, decide, and capture. Voice notes, AI conversations, letters to your future self — your entire mental life, offloaded and organised.

🤖 Peanut — Your AI Second Brain›
Peanut knows your full health history and your life context. Ask it to help you decide about a treatment, draft a letter to a specialist, process a difficult diagnosis, or just talk through what's on your mind. It thinks with you, not just for you. When you need evidence, Peanut pulls from PubMed and Mayo Clinic — grounding every answer in peer-reviewed research and trusted clinical sources, not the open internet.
🎤 AI Voice Notes — Capture Everything›
Speak freely — Chronicle transcribes and summarises automatically with bullet-point takeaways plus the full transcript. Meeting notes, thoughts on a commute, a conversation with your doctor — nothing gets lost.
✉️ Letters to Your Future Self›
Write sealed letters that unlock on a date you set — weeks, months, or a year from now. A Delivered letter from your past self is waiting. A deeply personal time capsule of who you are becoming.
🌐 3D Knowledge Graph — Your Thinking, Visualised›
As you add PDFs, books, voice notes, and journal entries, Chronicle Mind builds a 3D interactive knowledge graph — a living map of your ideas, decisions, and connections. Nodes grow and link as your second brain expands. Rotate, zoom, and tap any node to resurface the source. The more you add, the smarter and richer it becomes.
🔗 Import from Any AI Platform›
Already built context in ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Notion AI? Bring it all into Chronicle Mind. Upload your exported conversations, notes, and documents and they are absorbed into your second brain — searchable, linked, and referenced by Peanut. One unified knowledge base, no matter where your thinking started.
📉 Obsidian Vault Sync›
Chronicle Mind connects directly to your Obsidian vault. Your markdown notes, backlinks, and tags flow in automatically — no copy-pasting, no duplicating work. Obsidian handles the writing; Chronicle handles the intelligence on top of it.
📅  Plan Tab

Plan your day around your health.

A daily planner built for real life — where you're managing energy, treatments, and appointments alongside everything else. Just speak and Chronicle builds your schedule.

📋 Daily Plan — Morning, Afternoon, Evening›
Your day in three natural blocks with an anytime section for flexible tasks. A built-in week calendar glides between days. Syncs with your iPhone calendar so nothing falls through the cracks.
✨ AI Voice Scheduling — Speak Your Day›
Tap the mic and speak: "Study for boards from 7 to noon, call the pharmacy in the afternoon." Chronicle turns spoken words into properly timed tasks — no typing, no friction.
🔥  Reclaim Tab

Take back your time, your focus, your life.

A streak-powered discipline system with stoic daily intentions, curated habits, and a Focus Shield that blocks distracting apps when you need to do the work.

🌅 Daily Intention & Lifetime Minutes›
Every morning opens with a stoic quote and a stark counter of the minutes remaining in your life. 34,179,893 if you're 30 and live to 95. A visceral reminder to stop wasting time.
✅ 10 Daily Habits to Build›
No social media before 9am. Cold shower. 90-min deep work block. Read 20 pages. Meditate. Science-backed habits across Focus, Body, Work, Growth, and Mind — all yours to customise.
💪 Challenge Library›
Browse Reclaim Favourites, Discipline, and Mental Toughness categories. Tap to add any challenge to today's plan — from "No phone for one hour" to "GABA + magnesium for better sleep."
🛡️ Focus Shield — Block Distracting Apps›
Shield Instagram, TikTok, or any app using Apple Screen Time. Set a timed block or go all day. When blocking is active the selection locks — so you can't talk yourself out of it.

🔒 Double-Layer Deactivation Shield — Turning off a block isn't a one-tap escape. To unlock, you must: (1) answer a short set of reflection questions designed to make you pause and reconsider, and (2) have your phone physically plugged into a charger. Both conditions must be met simultaneously — making impulsive unlocking almost impossible. (NFC tag support in consideration for future releases.)

Your data never leaves
your phone. Ever.

Chronicle Health was built on one non-negotiable rule: your most personal information belongs to you and only you.

📱

100% on-device storage

Everything — visits, labs, moods, voice notes, letters — stored locally on your iPhone. No external servers. No cloud. Your health history lives where you live.

🚫

Zero data sold or shared

We don't sell your data to insurance companies, advertisers, or data brokers. Not now, not ever. This is a core founding promise, not a policy that can change.

🔑

You own everything

Export your data in standard formats any time. Delete everything with one tap. Chronicle doesn't hold your information hostage — it was never ours to keep.

🚫📊

No ads. No tracking. No profiling.

No advertising SDKs. No analytics packages watching what you do. No third-party trackers. What happens in Chronicle stays in Chronicle, full stop.

🤝

Our founding promise

Chronicle Health will never pivot to a data business. Your health journey is not a product to be monetised. We earn revenue through the app itself — and that model will never change.

One app.
Four superpowers.

You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
